hooks.command: powershell.exe -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$bad = @(); Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.json | ForEach-Object { $f = $_.FullName; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($f); if ($bytes.Length -ge 3 -and $bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF) { $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($bytes, 3, $bytes.Length - 3); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($f, $text, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)); $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($f) }; $c = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($bytes); try { $null = $c | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $bad += $f } }; if ($bad.Count -gt 0) { $msg = 'JSON parse error in: ' + ($bad -join ', '); Write-Output (ConvertTo-Json -Compress -InputObject @{ systemMessage = $msg }) }"
